name: agent-terminal
description: A local Mac terminal window that agents can connect to, type into, and read from.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/api-server.js && node --check src/agent-contract.js && node --check src/controller.js && node --check src/terminal-session.js && node --check src/client.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/renderer/renderer.js && node --check bin/agent-terminal.js && node --check bin/agent-terminal-mcp.js
